title: polypodium oxylobum
intro: Polypodium oxylobum, also known as Oxylobum, is a type of fern plant that belongs to the Polypodiaceae family, native to tropical regions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Polypodium oxylobum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Polypodium oxylobum is traditionally prepared as a tea or infusion, and its herbal preparations are also available in supplement form, often in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
